name: gemini-export
description: myORL medical website — Strapi CMS + Next.js frontend monorepo

scripts.dev:local: npx concurrently -n strapi,nextjs -c blue,green "npm run develop --prefix backend" "npx wait-on tcp:localhost:1337 && npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
